label: === TEST: Can mode 01/02 enable push/release on button 3? ===

Button 5 currently: black, green on press (mode 01/02 from earlier)
Btn 3 - SET mode 01 (push color) to yellow
Btn 3 - SET mode 02 (release color) to red
--- Pause 5s: PRESS BUTTON 3 - does it flash yellow? ---

Btn 5 - SET mode 01 (push color) to green
